title: GPTQ: Accurate Post-Training Quantization for Generative Pre-trained Transformers

ground_truth.methodology: One-shot weight quantization using approximate second-order Hessian information
ground_truth.key_results: Quantizes OPT-175B and BLOOM-176B to 3-4 bits in about four GPU hours with negligible perplexity increase

title: LLM.int8(): 8-bit Matrix Multiplication for Transformers at Scale

ground_truth.methodology: Mixed-precision 8-bit matrix multiplication that isolates outlier feature dimensions in fp16
ground_truth.key_results: Enables 8-bit inference for transformers up to 175B parameters with no measurable degradation in performance

title: SmoothQuant: Accurate and Efficient Post-Training Quantization for Large Language Models

ground_truth.methodology: Training-free post-training quantization that migrates activation outliers into weights via a per-channel smoothing scale
ground_truth.key_results: W8A8 quantization of OPT-175B with up to 1.56x speedup and 2x memory reduction at near-FP16 accuracy

title: AWQ: Activation-aware Weight Quantization for LLM Compression and Acceleration

ground_truth.methodology: Activation-aware weight quantization that protects salient weight channels using per-channel scaling derived from activation magnitudes
ground_truth.key_results: 4-bit weight quantization that outperforms GPTQ and delivers more than 3x speedup over FP16 with an efficient kernel

title: QLoRA: Efficient Finetuning of Quantized LLMs

ground_truth.methodology: 4-bit NormalFloat quantization with double quantization and paged optimizers combined with low-rank adapter finetuning
ground_truth.key_results: Finetunes a 65B model on a single 48GB GPU; Guanaco reaches 99.3% of ChatGPT performance on the Vicuna benchmark

title: SpQR: A Sparse-Quantized Representation for Near-Lossless LLM Weight Compression

ground_truth.methodology: Sparse-quantized representation that isolates outlier weights at high precision while compressing the remainder to 3-4 bits
ground_truth.key_results: Near-lossless 3.4-bit compression of LLMs, enabling 33B-parameter models to run on a single 24GB GPU

title: OmniQuant: Omnidirectionally Calibrated Quantization for Large Language Models

ground_truth.methodology: Block-wise post-training quantization with learnable weight clipping and learnable equivalent transformation
ground_truth.key_results: Strong low-bit W4A4, W3 and W2 post-training quantization across LLaMA models, surpassing prior PTQ methods

title: ZeroQuant: Efficient and Affordable Post-Training Quantization for Large-Scale Transformers

ground_truth.methodology: Hardware-friendly post-training quantization with group-wise weight and token-wise activation quantization plus layer-by-layer distillation
ground_truth.key_results: INT8 quantization of BERT- and GPT-style models with up to 5.19x latency reduction and minimal accuracy loss

title: QuIP: 2-Bit Quantization of Large Language Models With Guarantees

ground_truth.methodology: Quantization with incoherence processing that uses random orthogonal transforms to make weights and Hessians incoherent before adaptive rounding
ground_truth.key_results: First method to achieve viable 2-bit LLM quantization, with quality improving as model size increases

title: LLM-QAT: Data-Free Quantization Aware Training for Large Language Models

ground_truth.methodology: Data-free quantization-aware training that distills from data generated by the pretrained model and quantizes weights, activations and the KV cache
ground_truth.key_results: 4-bit weight and KV-cache quantization-aware training for LLaMA models that surpasses post-training quantization at low bit-widths
